subject: Upgrade to the iPhone 15 Pro Today, James!
body:
Hi James,

We hope you’re enjoying your iPhone 12 and the benefits of your current plan! As a valued premium subscriber with a monthly data usage of 45GB, we have an exciting upgrade opportunity just for you.

Introducing the iPhone 15 Pro! With its A17 Pro chip, you’ll experience unmatched performance, while the 48MP main camera with 3x optical zoom will elevate your photography to new heights. Plus, the ProMotion 120Hz always-on display and USB-C with USB 3 speeds ensure you stay ahead of the curve.

This upgrade offers you the ultimate iPhone experience — a pro-grade camera, a sleek titanium build, and all-day battery life, all for the same monthly spend of £55. 

Don’t miss out on this chance to enhance your mobile experience! Contact us today to arrange your upgrade.

Best regards,
Your Telco Team
